name: MVP Launch
description: Perfect for startups validating a concept with a fast, focused mobile release.

monthly.caption: A lean build lane for teams moving from idea to first release.

yearly.caption: Best for founders planning post-launch improvements without re-scoping every sprint.

name: Growth App
description: Built for product teams that need richer functionality, stronger UX, and ongoing release support.

monthly.caption: Ideal for scaling mobile products with active user acquisition and retention goals.

yearly.caption: The strongest fit for teams shipping consistently across product, UX, and growth.

name: Product Partner
description: A dedicated mobile product partnership for complex apps, deep integrations, and roadmap ownership.

monthly.caption: Best for established apps that need a reliable partner embedded in the roadmap.

yearly.caption: Designed for continuous feature delivery, optimization, and long-term product support.
